summary: Leadsheet 'Apply to Ableton' (PR #36) manual smoke PASSED. After re-installing the updated fork (ableset-2 with /live/song/get/project_path) while Ableton was closed, the handler loaded automatically (handlerStatus: present confirmed via WS tick). User ran the full flow in the leadsheet tab: PNGs written to Lyrics/<slug>/page-N.png in the project dir + arrangement clips at the stamp beats, AbleSet reads them. No divergence — built first-try-correct as a replica of the lyrics live-apply + the zip export's file layout.

criteria_results.text: Arrangement clips [img:<slug>/page-N.png] [full] at stamp beats, span to next
criteria_results.notes: Reuses writeStampClip + DEFAULT_CLIP_LENGTH; clip-name format copied verbatim from zip export.

criteria_results.text: project_path fork handler resolves the saved set's dir; unsaved → 409
criteria_results.notes: New handler loaded after reinstall; handlerStatus present.

process_issues.description: Adding a new fork handler requires users to re-run install:remote-script + relaunch Ableton. Installing while Ableton is CLOSED is the clean path (loads on next launch, no toggle). Documented in manual-smoke.md.

observed_chain: verification-gate PASS (133 unit, 47 e2e build+packaged, screenshot)
